mcpUrl.label: NotFair Google Ads MCP URL
mcpUrl.help: Platform-explicit NotFair Google Ads MCP endpoint.

oauthClientId.label: OAuth Client ID
oauthClientId.help: Set automatically by dynamic client registration during login. Do not edit manually.

oauthClientSecret.label: OAuth Client Secret
oauthClientSecret.help: Set automatically by dynamic client registration during login. Do not edit manually.

accessToken.label: Access Token
accessToken.help: Set automatically by openclaw notfair login. Do not edit manually.

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: Optional Bearer token for headless use. Set with openclaw notfair login --token.

requestTimeoutMs.label: Request Timeout (ms)
requestTimeoutMs.help: HTTP timeout for MCP tool calls.

filesystem.justification: Persist NotFair OAuth tokens and keep the plugin enabled across restarts.

network.justification: Call the NotFair hosted MCP server and OAuth endpoints via HTTPS.

localhost.justification: Run a short-lived loopback callback server for OAuth login.

child_process.justification: Open the user's browser for OAuth login and connection setup.
